reason: The first canonical macro-condition cell completed 0/3 passing runs and could not meet the preregistered 2/3 threshold.
root_cause_summary: The model flattened state_inventory.known_state into a top-level state_inventory array. Runs 1 and 2 moved unknown_state and forbidden_inferences to the root; run 3 omitted them.
next_protocol_requirement: Test hierarchical output-shape preservation with a literal JSON skeleton in a separate canonical repair smoke before preparing another 30-run perturbation slice.
pooling_policy: Do not pool Stage B v2 with any repaired successor.
